dialogueChunks.intro: Freedom, {player_name}. Real, hard-won freedom. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been overthrown, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} free at last.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} flies our banner now. {quest_ally} is helping establish a fair council to govern in place of the old authority. The people are choosing their own future for the first time.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave teeth to a dream that most thought impossible. We will never forget this.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the revolt succeeded. Your help to {quest_action} tipped the balance. {quest_threat_The} collapsed once the people stood united.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} celebrating in the streets. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been reclaimed by the people. {quest_ally} is already drafting new agreements to ensure this never happens again.
dialogueChunks.outro: You stood with the oppressed and helped them rise. That is a legacy to be proud of.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is over, {player_name}. The old regime is gone. {quest_threat_animate_The} fled when they saw the people would not back down.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} rebuilding on their own terms now. {quest_focus_The} serves the community instead of one tyrant. {quest_ally} says the mood is cautious but hopeful.
dialogueChunks.outro: Change is always frightening. But you showed us it is possible. Thank you.
